description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in business attire, featuring a collared dress shirt with long sleeves, buttoned at the cuffs, and a necktie. He wears fitted dress pants secured with a belt and formal dress shoes. The figure's hair is neatly styled and short, and his facial features are clean-shaven and well-defined. His arms are slightly bent at the elbows and held away from the body, with fingers relaxed and extended. The overall appearance is that of a professional individual, suitable for office or urban street environments.
description: A professionally dressed adult male in a collared shirt, tie, dress pants, and formal shoes, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, necktie, belt, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, belt, and pants, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: business shirt with necktie, dress pants, and formal belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
